description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a modern, rectangular layout and a flat roof. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows on several sides allowing for ample natural light. The house features multiple rooms, including what appears to be a living area, bedrooms, and a kitchen, all visible through the open floor plan. There is a prominent entryway with a small porch and steps leading up to the main door. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, and the house is accompanied by a small sign or mailbox near the front. The overall design is minimalistic, with clean lines and a functional, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and a minimalistic design. Features an open floor plan and a small entry porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, and a sign or mailbox; large windows and the open layout are visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, window placements, and the flat roof; entryway is less visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows and the back rooms; the open floor plan is evident.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows and the extended layout; entryway is not visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a simple door; minimal decorative elements.
